steps.title: Use the contrast with novel
steps.content: The sentence contrasts many earlier studies with the researchers' novel approach. Since the new path is unusual, the earlier studies must be ordinary or established, especially because they focus on the common above-sea-level case.

steps.title: Reject unsupported meanings
steps.content: Choice A would make the earlier studies unusual too, weakening the contrast with novel. Choice B means scarce, but the sentence says many studies exist. Choice D suggests lack of pattern, which is not the issue. The answer is C.
